name: A Bowl of Red
recipeIngredient: 1 package soy or textured vegetable protein (12 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash, stem, and remove seeds from the chilies. Put the chilies in 3 cups of cold water and bring to a boil.
2. After about 45 minutes to an hour, the skins should slip off easily. Mash the pulp into a paste.
3. If mashing is too difficult, substitute chili powder at the ratio of 1 tablespoon chili powder for each pod of chili.
4. Follow the instructions on the soy or TVP package to check if the product was soaked beforehand. If not, use some of the water to prepare this ingredient.
5. Sauté the onions in olive oil until translucent.
6. Add garlic and spices, then 12 cups of water.
7. Bring to a boil, then add the nuggets. Reduce heat and simmer for 30 minutes to an hour.
8. If the chili seems too runny, thicken with masa (cornmeal flour) used in tortillas.
9. When made in bulk, this chili can be frozen.
